description: Iterate over an array and run the nested `block` steps once per item. `input.source` must be a #{_ref(...)} expression resolving to a list. Inside the loop, reference the current item with a path element {"path_element_type": "current_item"} against the foreach step's alias.

Run the nested `block` steps when the condition tree is true. `input` is a condition tree: either a leaf {"lhs": "#{...}", "operand": "equals_to|not_equals_to|present|blank|contains|greater_than|less_than", "rhs": <value>} or a compound {"type": "compound", "operand": "and|or", "conditions": [...]}. An `elsif`/`else` step, when used, is the LAST child inside this step's `block`.
Alternative conditional branch; appears only as the last child of an `if`/`elsif` block. Same condition-tree input as `if`.
Fallback branch; appears only as the last child of an `if`/`elsif` block.
Stop the recipe run immediately (terminal status 'stopped').
Run nested steps; on a step error, run the trailing `catch` step's block instead of failing the recipe. A `catch` step, when used, is the LAST child inside this step's `block`.
Error handler; appears only as the last child of a `try` block.
Do-while loop; the trailing `while_condition` child holds the condition.
